residents.name: BIGALKE
residents.pressText: Amidst the interplay of darkness and light, he stands as the shadows cast their influence upon him. Pressure, melancholy, and rapture intertwine, fueling an ever-evolving stream of transformation. These elements manifest as sudden bursts of illumination, just like lightning, reflecting a reality born of a shared instant in time. The resulting flashes he creates, are fed by the profound connection between Techno, industrial destruction, groove, and broken structures.

residents.name: SHURAY & WALLE
residents.pressText:
Shuray & Walle – on friendship, one passion !

Based in Leipzig, they radiate an atmosphere and community, an aspect that is often disregarded these days. Those were the days, everything was about House Music. It was this feeling that we shared while listening, what  connected us. Making a difference in what they do while deciding what kind of difference to make.

Some groovy and Deep pumping Tunes for a great Afterhour.
residents.embeds: sunday service. · suncast.010 – shuray & walle

residents.name: SUBMOD
residents.pressText:
submod — that’s Felix and Basti — are a Leipzig-based duo operating in the space between House and Minimal since 2010. As part of Distillery Leipzig and the Kulturlounge, they’ve become a staple of the local club scene, known in particular for their extended closing sets.

Early influences from CDV and the Hoppetosse shaped their sound from the start — groovy and stripped to the essentials. That approach still defines them today.

Their catalog includes releases on Ethernal, Daydream, and Covered, among others. In 2023, they released their joint EP “Pellegrin” with Shuray&Walle. Featuring a remix by Traumer, the record has since found its way into the sets of Sven Väth, Dan Ghenacia, and XDB on a regular basis.
